message:
bench(lfu_cache): 27 benchmarks for O(1) LFU cache

8 groups: insert, get, peek, remove, throughput, capacity_scaling,
stats, clear. Key results:
- cold insert: ~145ns, warm insert: ~800ns (HashMap overhead)
- get hit: ~600ns (with frequency bump), miss: ~70ns
- peek: ~12ns (pure lookup, no frequency tracking)
- remove: ~450ns, stats query: ~1.8ns
- 10K insert throughput: ~1.6ms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -441,6 +441,14 @@ harness = false
 name = "quantile_sketch_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "lfu_cache_bench"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "quota_cost_ops"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
